pains_en: Maintenance requests scattered across WhatsApp, calls and email
No single view of SLA breaches and overdue work orders
Quotes and approvals stuck waiting for managers
Reactive instead of preventive maintenance
Client reporting is manual and inconsistent
pains_ar: طلبات الصيانة موزعة بين واتساب والمكالمات والبريد
لا توجد رؤية موحدة لتجاوزات اتفاقية مستوى الخدمة وأوامر العمل المتأخرة

pains_en: Project status spread across spreadsheets and chats
Variation orders and claims tracked manually
Subcontractor follow-up is reactive and slow
Cost overruns discovered too late
Executive reporting takes days to assemble
pains_ar: حالة المشروع موزعة بين الجداول والمحادثات

pains_en: Leads from listings lost without structured follow-up
Tenant requests and renewals tracked manually
Collections and arrears visibility is weak
No standardized proposal or quote process
Owner reporting is slow and inconsistent
pains_ar: عملاء الإعلانات يضيعون بلا متابعة منظمة
لا توجد عملية موحدة للعروض والتسعير

pains_en: Matter intake and conflict checks are manual
Engagement letters and proposals are inconsistent
Time and billing follow-up is leaky
Document workflows scattered across drives
Client status updates are ad hoc
pains_ar: سير عمل المستندات موزع بين الأقراص

pains_en: Proposals built from scratch every time
Pipeline lives in one person's head
Follow-up after meetings is inconsistent
Delivery handover loses context
Renewals and upsells are missed
pains_ar: العروض تُبنى من الصفر كل مرة
خط الأنابيب موجود في ذهن شخص واحد
